query: SELECT id, question_text_en, correct_option_id, options_json FROM quiz_questions WHERE id = 68;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Bk7aCGrDyRKGN1q.root --database T3XiKgmnDLqJNf6z2vN3GW --execute SELECT id, question_text_en, correct_option_id, options_json FROM quiz_questions WHERE id = 68;

rows.question_text_en: What is the purpose of a **Fiscal Metering Point**?
rows.options_json: [{"id": "a", "textAr": "قياس درجة حرارة النفط الخام.", "textEn": "To measure the temperature of crude oil."}, {"id": "b", "textAr": "قياس كمية النفط أو الغاز المباع رسمياً لتحديد الإيرادات والضرائب.", "textEn": "To measure the quantity of oil or gas sold officially to determine revenues and taxes."}, {"id": "c", "textAr": "قياس مستوى السائل في الخزان.", "textEn": "To measure the liquid level in a tank."}, {"id": "d", "textAr": "قياس سرعة الرياح في الموقع.", "textEn": "To measure wind speed at the site."}]
